---
title: "you_the_birthday"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
url <- "https://www.billboard.com/charts/hot-100/"
page <- read_html(url)

songs <- page %>% html_nodes("li ul li")
```

```{r}
songs_df <- songs %>%
  map_df(~{
    title <- .x %>% html_node("h3") %>% html_text(trim = TRUE)
    
    artist <- .x %>%
      html_nodes("span") %>%
      html_text(trim = TRUE)
    
    # Keep only the FIRST non-empty artist-like text
    artist <- artist[artist != ""][1]
    
    tibble(
      song_title = title,
      artist = artist
    )
  }) %>%
  filter(song_title != "") %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number())
```


```{r}
write_csv(songs_df, "billboard_hot100.csv")
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(lubridate)

# make all Saturdays from Jan 1 of this year to today
start_date <- as.Date(paste0(year(Sys.Date()), "-01-01"))
end_date <- Sys.Date()

all_days <- seq.Date(start_date, end_date, by = "day")
chart_dates <- all_days[wday(all_days, label = FALSE) == 7]   # Saturday

chart_dates
```
```{r}
get_billboard_chart <- function(chart_date) {
  url <- paste0("https://www.billboard.com/charts/hot-100/", chart_date, "/")
  
  message("Trying: ", url)
  
  page <- read_html(url)
  
  songs <- page %>% html_elements("li ul li")
  
  songs_df <- songs %>%
    map_df(~{
      title_node <- .x %>% html_node("h3")
      title <- if (!is.na(title_node)) html_text(title_node, trim = TRUE) else NA_character_
      
      artist_vec <- .x %>%
        html_elements("span") %>%
        html_text(trim = TRUE)
      
      artist_vec <- artist_vec[artist_vec != ""]
      artist <- if (length(artist_vec) > 0) artist_vec[1] else NA_character_
      
      tibble(
        song_title = title,
        artist = artist
      )
    }) %>%
    filter(!is.na(song_title), song_title != "") %>%
    mutate(
      rank = row_number(),
      chart_date = as.Date(chart_date)
    )
  
  songs_df
}
```

```{r}
charts_list <- map(chart_dates, get_billboard_chart)
```

```{r}
all_charts <- bind_rows(charts_list)
```


```{r}
write_csv(all_charts, "billboard_hot100_ytd.csv")
```
